source.source_name: GitHub Search — agentic AI and deterministic agents
source.scope: Exact agents_core and agents_protocols queries; up to 5 results per query; rolling 7-day pushed cutoff.

limitations: GitHub repository search is a capped query sample, not a platform-native trend ranking.
The seven-day pushed qualifier is broader than the three-hour collection window.
Search and verification omitted description, stars, and pushed_at; no acceleration is inferred.
Repository existence, public visibility, and non-archived state were verified via GitHub App.
